TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_John_Amaechi, title = John_Amaechi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/John_Amaechi} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 11, John Amaechi , squliq na p'unro. John Amaechi hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, p'agal tins' tay suruw, p pzyang pkaki' tay kska', pkaki' kkska'. John Amaechi sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 11, John Amaechi , squliq na p'unro. John Amaechi hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, p'agal tins' tay suruw, p pzyang pkaki' tay kska', pkaki' kkska'. John Amaechi sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
